item.title: 曝苹果独立 Siri 应用支持对话自动删除、底层模型大量替换为 Gemini
item.guid: 曝苹果独立-Siri-应用支持对话自动删除、底层模型大量替换为-Gemini
item.description:
Last night, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman revealed more details about Apple's upcoming standalone Siri app in his latest Power On newsletter. 昨晚，彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 在最新的 Power On 新闻通讯中透露了更多关于苹果即将发布的独立 Siri 应用的细节。

Privacy design is one of the core selling points of this new app. Gurman revealed that the app will feature a built-in automatic conversation deletion function, allowing users to choose conversation retention periods in settings: 30 days, 1 year, or permanent storage. Apple is expected to continue emphasizing privacy protection at this year's WWDC and highlight that its AI experience will be ad-free. 隐私设计是此次新应用的核心卖点之一。Gurman 透露，该应用将内置对话自动删除功能，用户可在设置中选择对话保留时长：30 天、1 年或永久保存。苹果预计在今年的 WWDC 继续主打隐私保护，并强调其 AI 体验不含广告。

Regarding the model, Apple has largely replaced the underlying AI model of the new Siri with Google's Gemini, and will run some services on Google's cloud infrastructure. Previously, there were reports that Apple and its original partner OpenAI had a rift in their relationship, and might even go to court, because OpenAI believed the results of their cooperation were not as expected. 模型方面，苹果已将新 Siri 的 AI 模型底层大量替换为 Google 的 Gemini，并将部分服务运行在 Google 的云基础设施之上。而此前有消息称，苹果和原本的合作对象 OpenAI 关系出现裂痕，甚至有可能对簿公堂，原因是 OpenAI 认为双方合作的结果不及预期。

It is worth noting that although the new AI Siri has been delayed for about two years, Gurman said that Apple's internal test version still labels it as "Beta" and may continue to do so until its official release. 值得注意的是，尽管新的 AI Siri 已经跳票约两年，Gurman 称苹果内部测试版本仍将其标注为「Beta」，并可能沿用至其正式发布。

item.title: 马耳他将向全体公民免费提供一年 ChatGPT Plus
item.guid: 马耳他将向全体公民免费提供一年-ChatGPT-Plus
item.description:
OpenAI recently announced that it has signed a cooperation agreement with the Maltese government to provide citizens and residents of the country with a one-year free ChatGPT Plus subscription service. OpenAI 日前宣布，与马耳他政府签署合作协议，向该国公民及居民免费提供为期一年的 ChatGPT Plus 订阅服务。

It is reported that residents must first complete the free online course "AI for All" developed by the University of Malta, which covers the basic concepts of AI, its capabilities, and responsible use. After passing, they can apply to the Malta Digital Innovation Authority for free subscription eligibility. 据悉，居民须先完成由马耳他大学开发的免费在线课程「AI for All」，课程内容涵盖 AI 的基本概念、能力边界及负责任使用方式，通过后即可向马耳他数字创新局申请免费订阅资格。

item.title: 小米 REDMI 产品经理：不打算换手机可以再等等，更多机型将支持电池升级服务
item.guid: 小米-REDMI-产品经理：不打算换手机可以再等等，更多机型将支持电池升级服务
item.description:
Xiaomi REDMI product manager "Suncun" recently posted on Weibo, suggesting that users who do not plan to replace their phones soon can consider waiting to replace the battery, and noted that the capacity of some models might even increase after replacing with a new battery, referring to the current policy for the Xiaomi 13 series. 小米 REDMI 产品经理「笋寸」日前在微博发文建议，近期不打算换手机的用户可以考虑等待换电池，并提示部分机型在更换新电池后容量可能还会有所提升，参考小米 13 系列的现行政策。

Suncun further explained that Xiaomi is actively promoting existing users to replace their batteries with large-capacity batteries using Jinshajiang technology, and the Xiaomi 13 series has already launched related services. She also revealed that specific supported models "will have to wait". 笋寸进一步说明，小米正积极推动存量用户更换采用金沙江技术的大容量电池，小米 13 系列已率先上线相关服务。她还透露，具体支持机型「得等等」。

Previously, the Xiaomi 13 series had fully launched a battery upgrade service, supporting the Xiaomi 13, Xiaomi 13 Pro, and Xiaomi 13 Ultra models to upgrade to larger capacity batteries, with a cost of 189 yuan, including a 149 yuan battery upgrade fee and a 40 yuan labor fee. 此前，小米 13 系列已全系上线电池升级服务，支持小米 13、小米 13 Pro、小米 13 Ultra 三款机型升级更大容量电池，费用为 189 元，其中电池升级费 149 元、人工费 40 元。

item.title: 目标估值 1.75 万亿美元，SpaceX 最快 6 月上市
item.guid: 目标估值-1.75-万亿美元，SpaceX-最快-6-月上市
item.description:
According to Reuters, SpaceX has accelerated its IPO timetable, planning to list on Nasdaq as early as June 12, with the stock code "SPCX", about two weeks earlier than the previously scheduled late June. 据路透社报道，SpaceX 已加快 IPO 时间表，计划最早于 6 月 12 日在纳斯达克挂牌上市，股票代码为「SPCX」，较此前预定的 6 月下旬提前约两周。

According to three informed sources, the company plans to publicly release its prospectus as early as this Wednesday, with roadshows scheduled to begin on June 4, and stock pricing to be completed as early as June 11. The main reason for the accelerated timetable is that the SEC's review of the prospectus materials progressed faster than expected. 据三位知情人士透露，公司计划最早于本周三公开招股说明书，路演定于 6 月 4 日启动，股票发行最早于 6 月 11 日完成定价。时间表提前的主要原因是 SEC 对招股材料的审核进展快于预期。

This IPO is expected to raise approximately $75 billion, with a target valuation of about $1.75 trillion, potentially becoming the largest stock offering in history. The underwriting syndicate includes Morgan Stanley, Bank of America, Citigroup, JPMorgan Chase, and Goldman Sachs. 此次 IPO 预计募资约 750 亿美元，目标估值约 1.75 万亿美元，有望成为史上规模最大的股票发行。承销行阵容包括摩根士丹利、美国银行、花旗集团、摩根大通和高盛。

item.title: arXiv 出台新规禁止 AI 垃圾，违者封禁一年加强制同行评审双重处罚
item.guid: arXiv-出台新规禁止-AI-垃圾，违者封禁一年加强制同行评审双重处罚
item.description:
Recently, the preprint academic paper platform arXiv announced that if an author's submitted paper contains irrefutable evidence of AI-generated content, their account will be banned for one year, and thereafter all submissions will be required to be accepted by a peer-reviewed journal before they can be uploaded. 近日，预印本学术论文平台 arXiv 宣布，若作者提交的论文中包含无可辩驳的 AI 生成内容证据，将被封禁账号一年，并在此后要求所有提交须先经过同行评审期刊接受方可上传。

Thomas Dietterich, Chair of the arXiv Computer Science section, posted on X that if a paper shows obvious signs such as "hallucinated citations" or large language model meta-comments (e.g., "Here is a 200-word summary, do you need to modify it?"), it can be concluded that the author has not verified the AI-generated content. arXiv 计算机科学板块主席 Thomas Dietterich 在 X 发文表示，若论文中出现「幻觉引用」、大语言模型元注释（如「以下是 200 字摘要，是否需要修改？」）等明显迹象，即可认定作者未对 AI 生成内容进行核查。

arXiv is currently managed by Cornell Tech, and will operate independently as a non-profit legal entity starting in July this year. Greg Morrisett, Dean of Cornell Tech, stated that after independence, arXiv will be able to receive financial support from a wider range of donors to cope with the operational pressure brought by "AI spam". arXiv 目前由康奈尔科技学院管理，今年 7 月将独立运营，成为一家非营利法人机构。康奈尔科技学院院长 Greg Morrisett 表示，独立后 arXiv 将能从更广泛的捐助方获得资金支持，以应对「AI 垃圾内容」带来的运营压力。

item.title: 卢伟冰：玄戒芯片今年肯定迭代、下半年部分国产旗舰直板机价格或破万元
item.guid: 卢伟冰：玄戒芯片今年肯定迭代、下半年部分国产旗舰直板机价格或破万元
item.description:
Recently, Lu Weibing, Partner and President of Xiaomi Group, stated during the "Max One Summer" outdoor camping live broadcast that the Xuanjie chip will definitely launch an iterative version this year, calling it "a very powerful chip" that will be featured in "a very excellent product". 近日，小米集团合伙人、总裁卢伟冰在「Max 一夏」户外露营直播中表示，玄戒芯片今年肯定会推出迭代款，并称这将是「一块非常强的芯片」，会搭载在一款「非常优秀的产品」上。

He also reminded the public that various related rumors circulating online are not highly credible, and specific specifications are not convenient to disclose at this time. Lu Weibing also revealed that the application scope of the new generation Xuanjie chip will no longer be limited to smartphones, and it is planned to be widely adopted in various types of smart terminal devices under Xiaomi in the future. 他同时提醒外界，目前网络上流传的各类相关传闻可信度不高，具体规格暂不便披露。卢伟冰还透露新一代玄戒芯片的应用范围将不再局限于智能手机，后续计划广泛搭载于小米旗下多类智能终端设备。

Regarding phone pricing, Lu Weibing made a judgment during the live broadcast, believing that in the second half of this year, especially towards the end of the year, the prices of some domestic flagship candy bar phones might exceed 10,000 RMB . He predicted that the pressure from rising memory prices would continue at least until the end of 2027, or even into 2028. 关于手机定价，卢伟冰在直播中作出判断，认为今年下半年尤其到年底， 部分国产旗舰直板手机价格可能突破 1 万元人民币 。他预计，内存涨价的压力至少延续至 2027 年底，甚至到 2028 年。

Regarding the upcoming Xiaomi 17 Max, he stated that pricing is still under discussion and will be officially announced at the launch event, but Xiaomi's principle is to offer "the most cost-effective product" in its category. 对于即将发布的小米 17 Max，他表示定价仍在讨论中，将在发布会上正式公布，但小米的原则是在同档位提供「最物超所值的产品」。

item.title: 蔚来李斌：萤火虫就像 iPhone，已超越汽车工具属性成为时尚品牌
item.guid: 蔚来李斌：萤火虫就像-iPhone，已超越汽车工具属性成为时尚品牌
item.description:
According to Vision Economy, at the 18th Xuanyuan Automobile Blue Book Forum held recently, William Li, founder, chairman, and CEO of Nio, attended online and, during a dialogue, likened Firefly to the iPhone, calling it "a very high-quality product". 据睿见 Economy 报道，在日前举行的第十八届轩辕汽车蓝皮书论坛上，蔚来创始人、董事长兼 CEO 李斌线上出席，在对话中将萤火虫比作 iPhone，称其已成为「一款非常高品质的产品」。

He emphasized that Firefly, in a sense, transcends the tool attribute of a car, evolving into "a lifestyle brand, a fashion brand," and beginning to form a unique brand culture. 他强调，萤火虫在某种意义上超越了汽车的工具属性，演变为「一个生活方式品牌、一个时尚品牌」，并开始形成独特的品牌文化。

He stated that Firefly breaks the dual limitations of age and car-buying budget for its user base, "young people who just graduated from university can buy it if they want, and wealthy bosses who want to drive their children to school themselves have no problem at all". 他表示，萤火虫在用户群体上打破了年龄与购车预算的双重限制，「大学刚毕业的年轻人想买也能买，很有钱的老板想自己开车送小孩上学也完全没有问题」。

item.title: 需求一年暴增逾 700%，前向部署工程师成 AI 时代最抢手岗位
item.guid: 需求一年暴增逾-700%，前向部署工程师成-AI-时代最抢手岗位
item.description:
According to Business Insider, the demand for Front-End Deployment Engineers (FDEs) has surged by over 700% in one year, making it one of the fastest-growing positions in the tech industry amidst the AI wave. 据《商业内幕》报道，前向部署工程师（FDE）的招聘需求在一年内激增逾 700%，正成为 AI 浪潮下科技行业增长最快的职位之一。

Data from the recruitment platform Indeed shows that in April this year, the number of job postings for this position reached 5,330, an increase of approximately 729% compared to 643 in the same period last year. Anthropic, OpenAI, Palantir, Stripe, and Google Cloud are all actively recruiting for this role. 招聘平台 Indeed 数据显示，今年 4 月该职位招聘帖数量达 5330 条，较去年同期的 643 条增长约 729%。Anthropic、OpenAI、Palantir、Stripe 及 Google Cloud 均在积极招募该职位人才。

The core responsibility of an FDE is to assist enterprises in integrating AI into their business processes and to customize and develop AI tools according to client needs. In terms of compensation, Indeed data shows that the annual salary for this position is approximately $170,000 to over $200,000 . FDE 的核心职责是协助企业将 AI 整合进业务流程，并根据客户需求定制开发 AI 工具。薪酬方面，Indeed 数据显示 该职位年薪约为 17 万至逾 20 万美元 。

item.title: 最低 1 元 40 万 Token，三大运营商推出 Token 套餐
item.guid: 最低-1-元-40-万-Token，三大运营商推出-Token-套餐
item.description:
China Telecom yesterday launched a series of trial commercial Token packages, offering integrated "Token + Connectivity + Security" services for developers and small and medium-sized enterprises, as well as individual and family users. All offer three tiers of packages, with pricing for individual and family users starting from 9.9 yuan/month for 10 million Tokens; for developers and small and medium-sized enterprises, it's 39.9 yuan/month for 15 million Tokens. 中国电信昨日推出系列试商用 Token 套餐，分别面向开发者及中小微企业、个人及家庭用户提供「Token+连接+安全」一体化服务，均提供三档套餐，面向个人及家庭用户定价 9.9 元/月起 1000 万 Token；面向开发者及中小微企业 39.9 元/月，1500 万 Token。

Both types of users can opt for a broadband uplink speed boost package (uplink speed increased by 50 Mbps, 100 yuan/month) and smart agent security manager service (5 yuan/month). Individual and family users can also additionally purchase a 5G-A premium package (including 10 GB data, uplink speed up to 300 Mbps, 20 yuan/month). 两类用户均可选购宽带上行提速包（上行速率提升 50 Mbps，100 元/月）及智能体安全管家服务（5 元/月）。个人家庭用户还可额外选购 5G-A 优享包（含 10 GB 流量，上行速率最高 300 Mbps，20 元/月）。

China Unicom and China Mobile, the two major operators, have also successively launched their respective Token packages: 联通、移动两大运营商也先后推出了各自的 Token 套餐：

  • Mobile: China Mobile Shanghai Company launched a universal Token service at its World Telecommunication Day press conference on May 17, priced at 1 yuan for 400,000 Tokens. 移动：中国移动上海公司于 5 月 17 日世界电信日发布会上推出 Token 通用服务，定价 1 元 40 万 Token。
  • Unicom: China Unicom Shanghai Branch released its fully localized "National Chip, National Model, National Cloud" security base on May 16, launching multiple Token products and integrated packages. 联通：中国联通上海分公司于 5 月 16 日发布全栈国产化「国芯国模国云」安全基座，推出多档 Token 产品及融合套餐。

item.title: 特斯拉 Robotaxi 碰撞事故报告解封
item.guid: 特斯拉-Robotaxi-碰撞事故报告解封
item.description:
Recently, Tesla officially declassified and released the complete, unredacted reports of 17 "Robotaxi" autonomous driving collision incidents submitted to the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA). 近期，特斯拉正式解密并公开了向美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）提交的 17 起「Robotaxi」自动驾驶碰撞事故的完整未脱敏报告。

According to Electrek, these 17 incidents occurred between July 2025 and March 2026, all involving 2026 Model Y vehicles undergoing "Robotaxi" testing in Austin, Texas, and safety drivers were present during all tests. 据 Electrek 报道，这 17 起事故发生于 2025 年 7 月至 2026 年 3 月，均涉及在得克萨斯州奥斯汀进行「Robotaxi」测试的 2026 款 Model Y，且测试时均有安全员在场。

Casualty data shows that the incidents were generally minor: 13 incidents resulted only in property damage, 2 had no injuries, 1 involved minor injuries not requiring hospitalization, and another 1 involved minor injuries requiring hospitalization (this was when the vehicle was rear-ended by an SUV while creeping at 2 mph at an intersection). 伤亡数据显示事故整体较轻微：13 起仅造成财产损失，2 起无人员受伤，1 起轻伤未入院，另有 1 起轻伤需入院治疗（系车辆在路口以 2 英里/小时蠕行时被后方 SUV 追尾）。

Official reports indicate that most incidents were not the fault of Tesla's Autopilot Driving System (ADS), but rather occurred when vehicles were completely stationary at traffic lights, stop signs, or in traffic jams, and were rear-ended or sideswiped by human drivers. 官方报告表明，大部分事故并非特斯拉自动驾驶系统（ADS）的过失，多为车辆在红绿灯、停止标志或交通拥堵中完全静止时，被后方人类驾驶员追尾或侧擦。

However, the data also reveals flaws in the system and backend intervention: 但数据同时也暴露出系统与后台干预的缺陷：

Two incidents occurred during remote operator takeover, causing the vehicles to collide with a metal fence and a construction barrier at 8 mph and 9 mph respectively; several other incidents showed that ADS had blind spots in spatial perception, with vehicles hitting metal chains, trailer hitches, wooden utility poles, and curbs while turning or reversing.

item.title: 💡 知乎 CEO 周源：AI 时代，每一个真实的人都拥有不可替代的价值
item.guid: 💡-知乎-CEO-周源：AI-时代，每一个真实的人都拥有不可替代的价值
item.description:
According to "Tingtong Tech," Zhou Yuan, founder and CEO of Zhihu, recently stated at the 12th New Knowledge Youth Conference that the value of authentic creators is irreplaceable in the AI era. 据「听筒Tech」报道，知乎创始人兼 CEO 周源日前在第十二届新知青年大会上表示，AI 时代真实创作者的价值不可替代。

AI creates wonders every minute, but the AI era still requires new knowledge. And new knowledge comes from real people. Every real person possesses irreplaceable value.

At the main forum of the conference, several guests discussed the relationship between AI and human creation. Liang Yong'an, a humanities scholar from Fudan University, posed the question, "Technology has its capabilities, but how do we ensure we also have our limitations? It requires human scale and humanistic attributes"; writer Zhang Chun stated, "Imperfection is our perfection." 大会主论坛上，多位嘉宾就 AI 与人类创作的关系展开讨论。复旦大学人文学者梁永安提出「科技有所为，如何让自己有所不为？需要人的尺度和人文属性」；作家张春称「不完美就是我们的完美」。

Zhou Yuan concluded the conference by stating: "The more developed technology becomes, the more valuable authentic, warm, and profound human creations are." 周源在大会结尾总结道：「技术越发达，有温度、有深度的真人创作就越宝贵。」

item.title: 小米 YU7 GT 火山灰配色公布
item.guid: 小米-YU7-GT-火山灰配色公布
item.description:
Recently, Xiaomi Auto once again released teaser images of the YU7 GT, revealing new color schemes and interior information for the new car. 近期，小米汽车再度放出 YU7 GT 的预热图片，公布了新配色以及新车的内饰信息。

Among them, the Xiaomi YU7 series will launch an additional color scheme named "Volcanic Ash," with the official introduction: 其中小米 YU7 系列将加推一款名为「火山灰」的配色，官方介绍：

Inspired by volcanic landscapes under morning mist, high-purity gray tones, layered with nanoscale mineral particles, present a delicate and layered metallic texture.

At the same time, the new car's interior also welcomes a brand new 'Racing Red': featuring a red and black contrast, offering exclusive embroidery. 同时新车内饰也迎来全新的「赛道红」：采用红黑撞色，提供专属刺绣。

The official statement indicates that the Xiaomi YU7 will also offer an exterior color scheme of 'Volcanic Ash', and the Cherry Red YU7 GT is now on display at some Xiaomi Auto stores. 官方表示，小米 YU7 也会提供「火山灰」外饰配色，并且现在车厘子红的 YU7 GT 已经在部分小米汽车门店展示了。

item.title: ChatGPT 能帮你管钱了，支持连接超 1.2 万家金融机构
item.guid: ChatGPT-能帮你管钱了，支持连接超-1.2-万家金融机构
item.description:
Recently, OpenAI launched a personal financial management feature for ChatGPT Pro users in the US, supporting connection to bank accounts and credit cards from over 12,000 financial institutions via Plaid. 近日，OpenAI 面向美国 ChatGPT Pro 用户推出了个人财务管理功能，支持通过 Plaid 连接超过 1.2 万家金融机构的银行账户和信用卡。

After connecting accounts, ChatGPT automatically reads the user's real balance, spending records, and debt data, generating a financial dashboard covering investments, daily expenses, subscriptions, and recent bills. When users ask questions, the model can directly pull up billing history, identify categories prone to overspending, and provide specific reduction plans. 连接账户后，ChatGPT 会自动读取用户的真实余额、消费流水和负债数据，生成一张覆盖投资、日常开销、订阅和近期账单的财务面板。用户提问时，模型可直接翻出账单历史，找出哪些类目容易超支，并给出具体的削减方案。

Additionally, users can provide ChatGPT with off-book information, such as 'I'm saving money to buy a car' or 'I still owe my parents money,' and the system will save this content as financial memory for subsequent conversations. 此外，用户还可以告诉 ChatGPT 一些账外信息，比如「我在攒钱买车」或「我还欠父母一笔钱」，系统会将这些内容保存为财务记忆，用于后续对话。

item.title: 马斯克：1.5T 参数「王炸」模型 Grok V9 三到四周内发布
item.guid: 马斯克：1.5T-参数「王炸」模型-Grok-V9-三到四周内发布
item.description:
Musk posted on X yesterday, revealing that the 9th version (V9) of the 1.5T parameter Grok foundational model being developed by SpaceXAI has completed training and is expected to be officially released within 3 to 4 weeks. 马斯克昨日在 X 发帖披露，SpaceXAI 正在研发的 1.5T 参数 Grok 基础模型第 9 版（V9）已完成训练，预计 3 到 4 周内正式发布。

The current public version, Grok 4.3, is based on the 0.5T parameter V8 foundational model and is currently iterated every few days. V9 will increase the parameter count to 1.5T, which Musk calls a 'significant upgrade'. 现役公开版本 Grok 4.3 基于 0.5T 参数的 V8 基础模型，目前每隔数日迭代一次。V9 将参数量提升至 1.5T，马斯克称其为「重大升级」。

At the end of the post, Musk even used the word 'banger' to describe his expectations for this version. 在帖子的结尾，马斯克更是用用「banger」（王炸）一词来形容对这一版本的预期。

item.title: 字节开源 Cola DLM：不再从左到右生成，扩散模型也能写文本
item.guid: 字节开源-Cola-DLM：不再从左到右生成，扩散模型也能写文本
item.description:
ByteDance's Seed team recently open-sourced the diffusion text generation model Cola DLM. Unlike mainstream large models that write word by word, token by token from left to right, this model first 'conceptualizes the main idea' in a continuous semantic space before converting it back into specific text. 字节跳动 Seed 团队近日开源扩散文本生成模型 Cola DLM。与主流大模型逐字逐 token 往右写不同，该模型先在连续语义空间里「想好大意」，再还原成具体文字。

Technically, Cola DLM consists of Text VAE and block-causal DiT. Text VAE compresses text into a continuous latent space, DiT learns semantic distribution within it via Flow Matching, and finally, a decoder reconstructs the text. Diffusion denoising occurs at the semantic layer, not the token layer. 技术上，Cola DLM 由 Text VAE 和 block-causal DiT 组成。Text VAE 把文本压缩进连续潜在空间，DiT 通过 Flow Matching 在其中学习语义分布，最后由解码器还原文本。扩散去噪发生在语义层，而非 token 层。

The open-source version has a total of approximately 2.3B parameters. In 8 evaluations including LAMBADA, MMLU, and HellaSwag, the paper states that its average score under a unified generative protocol surpasses that of AR and LLaDA baselines of similar scale. 本次开源版本总参数约 2.3B，在 LAMBADA、MMLU、HellaSwag 等 8 项评测中，论文称其在统一生成式协议下的平均得分超过同规模 AR 及 LLaDA 基线。

💻 GitHub: github.com/ByteDance-Seed/Cola-DLM 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/ByteDance-Seed/Cola-DLM 💻 GitHub: github.com/ByteDance-Seed/Cola-DLM 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/ByteDance-Seed/Cola-DLM

item.title: 腾讯 vibe coding 产品「吐司」即将上线
item.guid: 腾讯-vibe-coding-产品「吐司」即将上线
item.description:
According to Tech Planet, Tencent's internally incubated vibe coding product 'Toast' is about to launch. The Android version has already debuted on App Store and its official website, with the iOS version to follow. 据 Tech 星球报道，腾讯内部孵化的 vibe coding 产品「吐司」即将上线，安卓版已在应用宝及官网首发，iOS 版本后续跟进。

'Toast' is positioned as an 'application generation and inspiration co-creation platform'. Users do not need coding knowledge; by describing their needs in natural language, AI can complete the entire process from feature decomposition and prototype generation to APK packaging. 「吐司」定位为「应用生成及灵感共创平台」，用户无需代码基础，通过自然语言描述需求，AI 即可完成功能拆解、原型生成到 APK 打包的全流程。

In addition to application creation, version 1.0 also supports social sharing, an inspiration square (one-click replication or secondary creation of others' works), and AI application recommendations. It is free for a limited time during the public beta, offering 5 generation credits. 1.0 版本除应用创建外，还支持社交分享、灵感广场（一键复刻或二次创作他人作品）和 AI 应用推荐。公测期间限时免费，提供 5 次生成额度。

item.title: 蜜雪冰城上架老黄同款蜜桃四季春，销量暴涨
item.guid: 蜜雪冰城上架老黄同款蜜桃四季春，销量暴涨
item.description:
Recently, Mixue Ice Cream & Tea's official ordering mini-program launched an exclusive category called 'Boss's Choice', featuring 'Peach Four Seasons Spring' at the top. Previously, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang visited a Mixue store in Beijing's Nanluoguxiang and ordered a 'Peach Four Seasons Spring', which garnered widespread attention. 日前，蜜雪冰城官方点餐小程序上线「大佬同款」专属分类，将「蜜桃四季春」置顶展示。此前，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋到访北京南锣鼓巷蜜雪冰城门店，点了一杯「蜜桃四季春」，引发广泛关注。

According to Dahe Daily, a Mixue Ice Cream & Tea staff member responded that after the 'Boss's Choice' category was launched on the mini-program, the daily sales of Peach Four Seasons Spring increased by nearly 140% compared to the previous day, and over 90% compared to last Friday. At the Nanluoguxiang store visited by Jensen Huang, Peach Four Seasons Spring sales increased by over 90% month-on-month. 另据大河报报道，蜜雪冰城相关工作人员回应，小程序上线「大佬同款」后，蜜桃四季春当日销量环比前日增长接近140%，同比上周五增长超过90%。黄仁勋到访的南锣鼓巷店，蜜桃四季春销量环比增长超过90%。

item.title: 中国银行关停信用卡独立 App，服务整合进主 App
item.guid: 中国银行关停信用卡独立-App，服务整合进主-App
item.description:
According to CCTV News, Bank of China announced yesterday that its exclusive credit card mobile application 'Colorful Life' will officially cease service starting July 1st. Previously, several banks had successively announced the shutdown of their independent credit card apps. 据央视新闻报道，中国银行昨日发布公告，旗下信用卡专属手机应用程序「缤纷生活」将于 7 月 1 日起正式停止服务。此前，已有多家银行陆续宣布关停各自的信用卡独立 App。

Bank of China responded that this shutdown will not affect customers' normal usage experience, as all original services have been integrated into the main Bank of China App. Other banks that also announced the shutdown of their credit card apps stated that this move is part of mobile application integration and will not lower credit card service standards. 中国银行方面回应称，此次关停不会影响客户的正常使用体验，原有服务已全部整合至中国银行主 App 中。其他同样宣布关停信用卡 App 的银行也表示，此举属于移动端应用整合，不会降低信用卡服务标准。

Industry experts generally believe that reducing standalone apps helps banks lower operating costs; integrating credit card services into a comprehensive app also facilitates smooth switching between various financial services for customers, enhancing the overall user experience. 业内专家普遍认为，缩减独立 App 有助于银行降低运营成本；而将信用卡服务并入综合 App，也有利于客户在多种金融服务之间顺畅切换，提升整体使用体验。

item.title: 真人版《驯龙高手 2》杀青
item.guid: 真人版《驯龙高手-2》杀青
item.description:
Recently, the live-action "How to Train Your Dragon 2" has officially wrapped filming and is scheduled to be released in North American theaters on June 11, 2027. 日前，真人版《驯龙高手 2》已正式宣布杀青，计划于 2027 年 6 月 11 日在北美院线上映。

Referencing the animated version's plot, the sequel will continue the worldview of humans and dragons coexisting. Hiccup may face a major life turning point: he finds his long-lost mother, but Toothless is controlled by a villain, leading to his father's death. 参考动画版剧情，续集将延续人类与龙族共生的世界观，小嗝嗝或将迎来重大人生转折：他找到了失散多年的母亲，但无牙仔遭反派控制，父亲因此离世。

item.title: 《刺猬索尼克 4》正式杀青
item.guid: 《刺猬索尼克-4》正式杀青
item.description:
Director Jeff Fowler of "Sonic the Hedgehog 4" announced yesterday that filming has officially wrapped, sharing a photo with the new character Metal Sonic. The film is set to be released in North America on March 19 next year. 《刺猬索尼克 4》导演杰夫 · 福勒昨日发文宣布影片已正式杀青，并附上了与新角色金属索尼克的同框照片。影片定于明年 3 月 19 日在北美上映。

Metal Sonic was already foreshadowed at the end of the third film, and his official debut as a main character marks the first time this classic mechanical villain has been brought to the big screen in the series. Additionally, Amy Rose will also appear in this film, voiced by Kristen Bell. 金属索尼克早在第三部片尾便已埋下伏笔，此番以主要角色身份正式亮相，是该系列首次将这一经典机械反派搬上大银幕。此外，艾咪 · 罗斯也将在本片登场，由克里斯汀 · 贝尔配音出演。
